description: Composition:Black knit t-shirtWash care:Machine wash separately in cold water. Use mild detergent. Do not bleach. Avoid soaking. Line dry inside-out in shade. Warm iron only. Do not iron directly on print/embroidery.Fitting:Comfort FitThe cricket fever is high, and what best way to celebrate the season than going bold. Radiant, colourful electric energy radiating out of a black t-shirt is what nike offers cricket fans. This energetic design by Gautam Gajbar has all that one needs to charge up the atmosphere. So up the energy with this nike t-shirt, teaming it up with smart casuals.
